micro_segments.title: Rav Huna's Analogy: Comparing Slave Manumission to Seizing Property for a Creditor

macro_segments.title: Does a Master Have a Legal Obligation to Feed His Slave?

micro_segments.title: Initial Inference: The Mishna Seems to Say Masters Need Not Feed Slaves

The Slave with No Means: No Obligation to Make Up the Difference

macro_segments.title: Sanctifying a Slave's Labor: When Ownership Entitles a Master to Work

Rav's Position: If You Don't Feed Your Slave, You Cannot Sanctify His Labor

macro_segments.title: Rabbi Yochanan's Dissent: Master Can Collect Shevet Without Feeding the Slave
